metadata.title: FCC Family Care Centre | Johor Bahru | Holistic Nursing Care Home in JB
metadata.description: FCC Family Care Centre: Malaysia 1st Integrated Senior Living and Wellness Village offering holistic nursing, community, sustainable living, care farming, wellness programs, and healing gardens.

markdown:
FCC Family Care Centre | Johor Bahru | Holistic Nursing Care Home in JB

[![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/brizy/imgs/FCC-Logo-Horizontal-Original-210x59x0x0x210x59x1729522197.png "FCC Logo Horizontal-Original")](https://www.familycarecentre.co/)

[![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/brizy/imgs/FCC-Logo-Horizontal-Original-210x59x0x0x210x59x1729522197.png "FCC Logo Horizontal-Original")](https://www.familycarecentre.co/)

Malaysia 1ˢᵗ Integrated Senior Living and Wellness Village

Holistic Nursing Care Home 

[BOOK A TOUR](#Form_rRacWMUJRuCz)

**Where it feels like home**

### FCC Family Care Centre

FCC Family Care Centre is Malaysia 1ˢᵗ Integrated Senior Living and Wellness Village, focusing on community, environment, and sustainable living. A place for our residents to live, recover, and socialize around a beautiful home and edible garden.

We believe that community, environment, and lifestyle helps build a more holistic and complete model of care.

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/FCC-Logo-2026.png "FCC-Logo-2026")

### Our Core Focus

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Natural-green-environment.jpg "Natural-green-environment")

#### Natural Green Environment

Lush open garden, beautiful gazebo, and roaming farm animals. Our sustainable environment plays a vital role in healthy living and ensures the wellness of our community.

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Lifestyle-and-community.jpg "Lifestyle-and-community")

#### Lifestyle and Community

Our lifestyle and community foster independence, purpose, and socialization for our residents. From technology classes to fitness programs, there’s something for everyone here.

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Our-care-approach.jpg "Our-care-approach")

#### Our Care Approach

Our residents are family and we provide the best form of care we know. We provide personalized care and are always learning new caregiving approaches. Our dedicated professional partners ensure appropriate medical and rehabilitative care is delivered.

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Care-farming.jpg "Care-farming")

#### Care Farming

Sustainable and Ethical farming practices not only provide us with healthy food but also a therapeutic way of healing. Our farming spaces feed and heal us.

**Nature Living Home Environment**

### Our Care Beliefs

We believe in caring for our loved ones in a familiar home environment.

We believe that caregiving is multi-faceted and extends beyond just medical care.

We believe that community support, our environment, and lifestyle helps build a holistic and complete model of care.

We believe in nature's ability to help heal and recover.

We believe in rethinking and redesigning our environment to care for our loved ones. 

We believe in sustainable and healthy living as part of aging.

[BOOK A TOUR](#Form_rRacWMUJRuCz)

### Creating A Sustainable Retirement Village

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Artboard-1-1.png "Artboard 1")

Library

Our library offers residents a wide selection of books, movies, and interactive materials, promoting mental stimulation and relaxation.

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Artboard-2-1.png "Artboard 2")

#### Craft Room

Our craft room provides a space for residents to engage in creative activities, such as painting, knitting, and woodworking.

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Artboard-3-1.png "Artboard 3")

#### Pet-Friendly

We allow pets in our community, promoting the bond between residents and their furry friends.

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Artboard-4.png "Artboard 4")

#### Outdoor Spaces

We provide ample space for outdoor activities such as hiking, birdwatching, and picnicking.

### Our Services

#### Stay-in Home Care

Provides full-board accommodation for our residents. We require continued engagement with family members and encourage visitation. Our grounds are big enough for family members to spend the day here.

#### Day Care Facilities

Daycare facilities provide an option for residents to stay at our home during the day with meals provided. They can engage, interact and socialise with our community, and also receive basic medical care and attention.

#### Rehabilitation Therapy and Social Activities

We work closely with our healthcare partners to provide basic physiotherapy and activities for our residents in need of physical rehabilitation. It helps that we have a beautiful and spacious garden to conduct various activities.

#### Event Spaces for Hire

Family Reunion? Birthday celebration coming up? Want a beautiful event space to celebrate key moments with your loved ones? We provide indoor and outdoor event spaces for family members and visitors to hire. Come and and mingle with our lovely residents in the great outdoors while enjoying organic and healthy produce at the same time.

[BOOK A TOUR](#Form_rRacWMUJRuCz)

**Where it feels like home**

### Our Care Homes

#### The CHS Home

#### MemoryCare Home​

### Our Team

#### Care professionals dedicated to caregiving with compassion, love and respect

Meet Our Compassionate and Experienced Caregivers at FCC Family Care Centre. At FCC Family Care Centre, our team of dedicated professionals is committed to providing exceptional caregiving services to our elderly residents.

**1st AI-powered Residential Retirement Village in Malaysia**

### SmartPeep Monitoring System Features

#### A Safe Environment, Supported by Smart Technology

At FCC, we enhance our care with the support of SmartPeep, an intelligent monitoring system designed for elderly safety and wellbeing. 

SmartPeep uses "vision AI technology" to turn standard CCTVs into intelligent optical sensors that monitor residents 24/7. 

[LEARN MORE](https://www.familycarecentre.co/smartpeep-monitoring-system/)

Reviews 

#### Pauline Aw

Large nice area for the old folks to walk around. We were promptly alerted during any emergencies. They have doctors and nurses who will come and check on the residents regularly. I find that very helpful. Special thanks to Ms. Bava for being so understanding, helpful, patient and kind.

#### Nurul Nazira

This place can help me calm my mind because this area surrounded by nature environment, farm, which is will be a good choice for us to stay here and visit also staffs here are very friendly and able to provide great service

#### Mike Windel

Speaking to Bava n Hani was very comforting. They focussed on the care n service that FCC could offer. Meeting with Hani in person was also very lively. She left me with the impression that she was passionate about her job n the patients under her care. Thanks ladies. Best regards, Wendy

![](https://www.familycarecentre.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Untitled-2.jpg "Untitled-2")

Best Nursing Homes

FCC Family Care Centre offers a spacious and natural environment to let their client feel closer to nature. Due to this, they are among the most sought-after nursing home in Singapore...[READ MORE](https://www.thebestsingapore.com/biz-review/fcc-family-care-centre-review/)
